_description: GotH — Convert guitar tablature to harmonica tabs online. Free, supports multiple keys and reed counts.
hero_subtitle: Convert guitar tabs to harmonica tabs in seconds
hero_desc: GotH is a free, fast and simple tool that helps you convert guitar tablature to harmonica. It includes advanced options for different types of harmonicas.
feature_1_desc: Convert tabs in real-time without waiting
feature_2_desc: Supports bends, overblows and other special notes
feature_3_desc: Choose harmonica key, number of frets and more
step_1_desc: Select your harmonica key and adjust fretboard preferences
step_2_desc: Enter notes by clicking on guitar fretboard fields
step_3_desc: Get guitar tabs and harmonica tablatures in real-time
faq_1_a: GotH is completely free and open source. There are no hidden costs or subscriptions.
faq_2_q: Do I need to create an account?
faq_2_a: No, no account is required. GotH runs on your device without storing data on servers.
faq_3_a: All diatonic harmonicas from C to F# are supported. The selection is available in the editor.
faq_4_a: Yes, GotH is a progressive web app (PWA) and can be used offline.
cta_desc: Click below and open the editor with full features
clear_modal_body: Are you sure you want to delete the entire tab?
about_intro_p1: GotH (Guitar to Harmonica) is a free online tool for musicians who want to play guitar melodies on the harmonica. It converts guitar tabs into harmonica tablature in real-time — no account, no installation needed.
about_intro_p2: The project is run by a single developer-musician. It has visitors from all over the world, which is amazing and very motivating — thank you all!
about_wip_desc: GotH is currently in beta. Core features are stable, but optimizations, expanded harmonica type support, and UI improvements are still in progress. Every piece of feedback directly shapes development.
about_plan_1: Support for chromatic and tremolo harmonicas
about_contact_desc: If GotH is useful to you, or you have an idea for improvement — let me know! Every message is welcome and helps shape the tool.
about_form_email: Email (optional — if you'd like a reply)
about_form_rating: How useful is GotH to you?
about_github_text: GotH is open-source. View the code, report a bug, or contribute on GitHub:
about_form_error: ❌ Sending failed. Please try again or reach out directly.
about_name_p1: The logical acronym would be GTOH — but GotH sounds cooler, is easier to remember, and — let’s be honest — programmers love a good dark mode.
about_name_p2: If Java can be named after coffee and Python after a British comedy, GotH proudly continues the fine tradition of questionable naming conventions in software engineering.
about_problem_p: Many songs have iconic guitar riffs that sound amazing on a harmonica — but guitar tabs (expressed in frets) and harmonica tabs (expressed in blow/draw holes) speak two different languages. GotH bridges that gap instantly.
